ssc-chemistry-ch09-set10-q01.answer: Phenolphthalein or methyl orange (both can be used)
ssc-chemistry-ch09-set10-q01.explanation: Both phenolphthalein and methyl orange can indicate endpoint depending on exact conditions; phenolphthalein commonly used for strong acid-strong base titration. — এই chapter-এর core concept (Board-standard concept) থেকে বোর্ডে সরাসরি ও application MCQ নিয়মিত আসে।
